title: Book Of Dragons (IOB)
description: Book of Dragons is a content addon for Isle of Berk (IOB) that introduces an in-game reference book dedicated entirely to dragons.
body:
![https://feasthost.org/aff/Ziller](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f76e3beed71fc563fc23e00798db0e628b8470dd.png)[Use code Ziller for 5% off ](https://feasthost.org/aff/Ziller)

Book of Dragons is a content addon for Isle of Berk (IOB) that introduces an in-game reference book dedicated entirely to dragons.

The mod adds a comprehensive dragon encyclopedia that provides detailed information on every dragon available through IOB and supported addons. Each entry documents key aspects such as the dragon’s species, behavior, abilities, habitat, and notable traits, allowing players to learn about dragons without relying on external wikis.

Designed for immersion and usability, the Book of Dragons functions as a lore-friendly guide and gameplay companion, making dragon knowledge easily accessible during survival or progression-based play. It is ideal for players who want deeper understanding of dragons, modpack creators who value in-game documentation, and servers that discourage out-of-game references.

Requires: Isle of Berk (IOB)
Purpose: In-game dragon information, lore, and reference system
sneakpeaks/updates and bug report here: https://discord.gg/tT7QbHRFgg
